findings.summary: EMG amplifier (40 components). 0 opamp circuits detected despite 3x OPA187 + 1x OPA2375 (4 active instances). 0 instrumentation amp circuits despite INA821. Dual +/-3V3 supply -3V3 rail decoupling not analyzed.

missed.description: 0 opamp circuits detected despite 3x OPA187 + 1x OPA2375 (4 active opamp instances)
0 instrumentation amp circuits detected despite INA821 present
Dual +/-3V3 supply: -3V3 rail decoupling not analyzed

suggestions: Analyze negative rail decoupling for dual supply designs
